author: Rana Usman
name: Asymmetric 1/10 Encoder-Decoder Split + Systematic Exploration
blurb: One-line change: setting num_encoder_layers=1 (instead of num_layers//2) monotonically improves BPB. Validated on baseline code (-0.016 BPB across 4 split ratios on RTX 5090) and SOTA code (-0.004 BPB). 8xH100 partial run reached 1.1492 pre-quant BPB at step 5666/9000 (FA2 speed bottleneck prevented full training). Background: 27 systematic experiments on M4 MacBook exploring deep supervision, LR tuning, batch scaling, and architecture.
